author: claude
content: VDD R3 NOT CONVERGED — Verdict: Sloppy. HAS_PYTEST_POSTGRESQL flag is defined but never referenced — postgresql_scenarios is always ['postgresql'] unconditionally. SQLite-only envs get FixtureLookupError. Also: psycopg2 AND psycopg2-binary both listed (mutually exclusive), silent except ImportError: pass hides broken installs. Needs R4.
